blocks.text: Meeting Minutes: Valuation Analysis for Woods LLC
Working session on the {{fact:f:E-2020-001.client}} engagement, held by video conference. Minutes prepared by Ryan Strong; please send corrections to him directly.

items: Sandra Perez, Director, Fernhollow Partners LLC
Briana Dennis, Senior Associate, Fernhollow Partners LLC
Ryan Strong, Analyst, Fernhollow Partners LLC
Amanda Golden, VP Finance, Woods LLC
Daniel Powell, Office Manager, Fernhollow Partners LLC

blocks.text: Sandra Perez opened with model status. The income approach has cleared first review, and the open items now sit in the supporting schedules rather than the core model. Briana Dennis walked through the working-capital reconciliation and noted one figure she cannot yet trace to source; it is flagged in the workbook rather than smoothed over, and Amanda Golden agreed to run it down with her controller.

Discussion then turned to the readout. Amanda Golden expects the board to press hardest on the market approach, so the comparable-company section will carry a fuller appendix than usual. Daniel Powell confirmed the client's preferred meeting windows and will circulate calendar holds once the draft clears second review.

rows: Trace the flagged working-capital figure with the controller
Complete tie-out of the comparable-company tabs
Expand the market-approach appendix in the draft report
